title: modularize buildah/util
body: The `buildah/pkg/util` package imports a vast amount of dependencies which can lead to surprising transitive dependency chains (see https://github.com/containers/image/pull/564#issuecomment-483983199). The package should be modularized. Breaking it into several smaller packages with dedicated functionality should avoid pulling in too many unrelated dependencies and make it more portable.

comments.body:
I think we can close it as the most urgent issue was fixed, but the util package still has some "surprising" implications. Here are buildah-internal users of `util`.
```
Index File                       Line Content
    0 add.go                       15 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    1 bind/mount.go                11 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    2 bind/util.go                  4 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    3 buildah.go                   14 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    4 chroot/run.go                22 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    5 chroot/run_test.go           18 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    6 cmd/buildah/commit.go        12 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    7 cmd/buildah/images_test.go   12 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    8 cmd/buildah/push.go          12 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
    9 cmd/buildah/rm.go             8 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   10 cmd/buildah/rmi.go           10 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   11 cmd/buildah/run.go           12 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   12 cmd/buildah/tag.go            5 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   13 commit.go                    12 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   14 imagebuildah/build.go        20 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   15 import.go                     7 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   16 new.go                        9 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   17 pkg/cli/common.go            14 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   18 pull.go                      10 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   19 run_linux.go                 29 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   20 tests/imgtype/imgtype.go     13 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
   21 util.go                       9 "github.com/containers/buildah/util
```

`pkg/cli` for instance will require users of it to import `docker/distribution` and the `runtime-spec`.
